name: Central DeWitt High School
description: Central DeWitt High School is a place to play pickleball in DeWitt, IA. There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net.

name: DeWitt Outdoor Courts
description: DeWitt Outdoor Courts is a place to play pickleball in DeWitt, IA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility is wheelchair accessible.

name: River Cities Tennis & Pickleball
description:
River Cities Tennis and Pickleball provides multiple different pickleball programs and pickleball lessons in Clinton, Iowa for both members and non-members.

Our four indoor tennis courts convert to eight pickleball courts and powerful LED lighting offers excellent visibility. 

River Cities Tennis and Pickleball is also a wonderful facility to rent for corporate functions, birthday parties, graduation parties, family reunions and other events where you want to incorporate tennis and/or pickleball!
fees: Fee required — Current rates for members and non-members can be found on our website here: https://rivercitiestennisandpickleball.com/rates

name: Riverfront Courts
description: Riverfront Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Clinton, IA. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights and restrooms.

name: Riverview Park Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Riverview Park Pickleball Courts in Clinton, IA! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and lights. You can reserve the courts.
